items.title: Lindsey Graham, Republican senator, 1955-2026
items.description: Veteran proponent of US power was a Trump critic who became one of the president’s most influential advocates

items.title: Qatar’s Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa al-Thani dies aged 74
items.description: Former ruler was known for modernising gas-rich Gulf state and pursuing regional dialogue rather than confrontation

items.title: Iran bets Trump will blink first
items.description: Tehran takes high-stakes gamble with US over Strait of Hormuz

items.title: US and Iran exchange fresh strikes in battle over Strait of Hormuz
items.description: Trump claims waterway is open while Tehran says it will remain closed until ‘further notice’

items.title: Zelenskyy dismisses Ukraine’s PM in cabinet shake-up
items.description: Yulia Svyrydenko to exit as president announces sweeping government changes less than a year since last reshuffle

items.title: The great reinvention of Hunter Biden
items.description: You have to hand it to him — the man knows how to troll with the best of them

items.title: Knives out at US Supreme Court as justices’ squabbles go public
items.description: The spilling-over of partisan divisions on the normally collegiate bench erodes public support for the institution

items.title: US senator Lindsey Graham dies aged 71
items.description: South Carolina politician was one of the most influential and hawkish Republicans

items.title: Russia closes in on city that made the Kremlin glitter
items.description: Kostyantynivka in eastern Ukraine produced the red glass in Moscow landmarks. Now Putin is reducing it to rubble

items.title: China cracks down on top ratings for corporate bonds
items.description: Regulators pressure agencies to limit triple-A designations for higher-interest borrowers
